items.markdown:
![Cooking On Salt Blocks - Meathead's AmazingRibs.com](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161012-4353-0139-0000-c8845509cf90:32)
Himalayan salt blocks are `versatile, mineral-rich slabs used for searing, grilling, curing, or chilling foods like meats, seafood, and vegetables` . They impart a delicate,  nuanced saltiness rather than overpowering saltiness. Use on gas stoves or grills by heating slowly to avoid cracking.[[1]](https://www.amazon.com/UMAID-Himalayan-12x8x1-5-Grilling-Pamphlet/dp/B07BB6HWT6)[[2]](https://meatnbone.com/products/himalayan-salt-plate-with-ceramic-holder)[[3]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Naturally-Maintains-Temperature-Thanksgiving/dp/B08PN6LM71)[[4]](https://www.amazon.com/POHS-Himalayan-Salt-Block-Slab/dp/B07TCW7LN1)[[5]](https://www.amazon.com/Caravel-Gourmet-Himalayan-Salt-Block/dp/B07FWYL3C5)

**Key Aspects of Using a Himalayan Salt Block** 

- **How to Use (Heating):** Start with a cold block and heat it slowly on a gas stove or grill, increasing the temperature gradually over 45–60 minutes to prevent cracking. A metal holder is recommended to hold the block.
- **How to Use (Chilling):** Freeze or chill the block for 2–3 hours to serve cold dishes like sushi, sashimi, cheese, appetizers, or desserts like ice cream.
- **Cooking Methods:** Ideal for searing thin cuts of steak, seafood (scallops, shrimp), and vegetables. The block retains heat for 20-30 minutes.
- **Benefits:** These blocks are 100% natural, containing over 80 minerals, and provide a unique, interactive, and high-temperature cooking experience.
- **Cleaning & Care:** Do not submerge in water or use soap. Scrape off food residue, quickly rinse, and wipe dry. Allow the block to air dry for at least 24 hours.
- **Lifespan:** With proper care—slow heating and dry storage—a salt block can last for many uses, though it will naturally degrade over time.[[1]](https://seasalt.com/salt-101/about-himalayan-salt/using-himalayan-salt-blocks)[[2]](https://www.amazon.com/Caravel-Gourmet-Himalayan-Salt-Block/dp/B07FWYL3C5)[[3]](https://himalayansecrets.com/products/himalayan-salt-cooking-block-12-x-8-x-2)[[4]](https://www.amazon.com/UMAID-Himalayan-Pamphlet-Grilling-Serving/dp/B08CQ19R6F)[[5]](https://www.amazon.com/Himalayan-Naturally-Maintains-Temperature-Thanksgiving/dp/B08PN6LM71)[[6]](https://www.tiktok.com/@turnipvegan/video/7351490720538185003)[[7]](https://www.amazon.com/DOBADN-Himalayan-Cooking-Support-Grilling/dp/B09SYXYW13)[[8]](https://www.amazon.com/POHS-Himalayan-Salt-Block-Slab/dp/B07TCW7LN1)[[9]](https://www.caravelgourmet.com/products/himalayan-salt-block-grilling-salt-brick-8x8)

This video shows you how to use a Himalayan salt block for grilling:![](https://api.dataforseo.com/cdn/i/03161012-4353-0139-0000-c8845509cf90:33)
